description_long: This is a large, modern SUV with a bold, angular body finished in a bright red color. The vehicle features four passenger doors, tinted windows, and a prominent black grille with a gold Chevrolet bowtie emblem on the front. The wheels are large and black, with a multi-spoke design that adds a sporty touch. The rear of the SUV has a wide window, a subtle roof spoiler, and a visible license plate. The overall design suggests a robust, urban-ready vehicle suitable for families or groups, with ample interior space and a sturdy exterior.
description: A bright red, four-door Chevrolet SUV with black multi-spoke wheels, tinted windows, and a bold, angular design.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the wide back window, subtle roof spoiler, and visible license plate.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the four doors, black wheels, and tinted windows.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the black grille, gold Chevrolet emblem, and angular hood.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the doors, wheels, and window arrangement.
